message:
Agent: Offload diff syntax highlighting to worker pool

Wrap MessageList with WorkerPoolContextProvider from @pierre/diffs
to move Shiki highlighting off the main thread. Diffs now render
plain text instantly and upgrade asynchronously, reducing jank when
opening threads with many diffs.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/o27tpgewnfdkyj6q94jgob2w
